message:
fix: atomic label removal in queue release to prevent orphaned claims (gt-qpkwh)

releaseQueueMessage removed claimed-by and claimed-at in two separate bd
commands. A crash between them could leave a message with claimed-at but no
claimed-by. Also hardened listUnclaimedQueueMessages to check both fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
